name: NVIDIA AD106M HDA HDMI/DisplayPort Audio
quirks: HDMI and DisplayPort endpoints are sink-only and unavailable unless an active display exposes audio.
Do not treat this device as capture hardware or a low-latency monitoring target.
Exact channel count and sample-rate support come from display ELD/SAD data, so keep automatic defaults conservative.
source_notes: Local PCI inventory reports NVIDIA AD106M HDA Audio 10de:22bd.
NVIDIA's HDMI audio documentation describes GPU HDMI/DisplayPort audio as an HDA sound card whose usable formats depend on connected display ELD/SAD data.
Local ALSA/PipeWire exposes NVIDIA outputs as HDMI/DisplayPort sinks only.
